narrative: Reports of a US-Iran peace memo drive a sharp return in risk appetite — USD/JPY retreats to 155.93 as the geopolitical risk premium unwinds; gold higher +3.11% near $4,710; equities +0.81%; DXY -0.61%; VIX 16.7. NZD/CAD emerges as the week's dominant G8 theme (1.168% spread) as NZD hits eight-week highs on the risk reset. Eurozone PMI contraction at 48.8 and a 175bp Fed-ECB carry advantage cap EUR/USD at 1.1774. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27.
